query:
INSERT INTO pulse_transactions (
                id,
                billing_account_id,
                amount_pulse_cents,
                transaction_type,
                reference_id,
                created_at
            ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW())
            RETURNING id, billing_account_id, amount_pulse_cents,
                      transaction_type as "transaction_type: PulseTransactionType",
                      reference_id, created_at
